title: "He’s just been completely crazy": Connor Murphy's friend reveals what happened when the cameras stopped rolling
summary_full: Connor Murphy's close friend Austin Wayne says the late fitness influencer's controversial looksmaxxing persona was largely an act created for content. Remembering Murphy as calm, kind and genuine, Wayne urged people to stop chasing clout from his death and instead prioritize mental health, saying, "That's much more important than looksmaxxing."
